name: Suspicious Remote AppX Package Locations
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Remote AppX Package Locations
SIGMA Description: Detects an appx package added the pipeline of the "to be processed" packages which is downloaded from a suspicious domain

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=854 AND (LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%.githubusercontent.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%anonfiles.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%ddns.net%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%dl.dropboxusercontent.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%ghostbin.co%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%glitch.me%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%gofile.io%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%hastebin.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%mediafire.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%mega.nz%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%onrender.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%paste.ee%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%pastebin.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%pastebin.pl%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%pastetext.net%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%privatlab.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%privatlab.net%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%send.exploit.in%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%sendspace.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%storage.googleapis.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%storjshare.io%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%supabase.co%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%temp.sh%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%transfer.sh%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%ufile.io%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Remote AppX Package Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=854 AND (LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%.githubusercontent.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%anonfiles.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%ddns.net%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%dl.dropboxusercontent.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%ghostbin.co%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%glitch.me%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%gofile.io%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%hastebin.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%mediafire.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%mega.nz%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%onrender.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%paste.ee%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%pastebin.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%pastebin.pl%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%pastetext.net%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%privatlab.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%privatlab.net%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%send.exploit.in%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%sendspace.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%storage.googleapis.com%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%storjshare.io%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%supabase.co%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%temp.sh%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%transfer.sh%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%ufile.io%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Remote AppX Package Locations
